2026-04-22T16:24:00.1197692Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T16:24:00.1198018Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T16:24:00.1198303Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T16:24:00.1198550Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T16:24:00.1198743Z [36;1m[0m
